business_overview.description: Archer Daniels Midland Company (ADM) is a global leader in agricultural processing and food ingredient solutions. The company operates through several key segments including Ag Services, Crushing, Refined Products and Other, Ag Services and Oilseeds, Starches and Sweeteners, VCP (Value Chain Products), Carbohydrate Solutions, Human Nutrition, Animal Nutrition, and Nutrition. ADM processes agricultural commodities such as corn, soybeans, wheat, and oilseeds into various food ingredients, animal feed, and industrial products. The company has a significant global presence with operations in North America, South America, EMEA (Europe, Middle East, and Africa), and APAC (Asia-Pacific). Its key end markets include food and beverage manufacturers, animal feed producers, and industrial users.
